name: Submit — zero improvement (baseline = outcome) is handled gracefully

planSteps.description: Dismiss the onboarding modal if present (Escape key or × button)
Select any metric from the metric selector
Enter 5 in the baseline severity/score input
Enter 5 in the outcome severity/score input (same value — no improvement)
Set the minimum improvement threshold to 20

The app must handle the no-improvement case gracefully — either (a) the Generate Proof button is disabled with a visible reason like 'No improvement — outcome must be better than baseline', or (b) the app attempts proof generation and returns a clear failure message like 'Improvement below threshold' or 'passed=false'. The app must NOT crash, hang silently, or show a stack trace.
